name: Super Pixel Merge Balls
short_description: A fast-paced arcade game where you merge pixel balls in search of the perfect combo! Quick, challenging, and addictive — ideal for short sessions or high score chases.
detailed_description:
Super Pixel Merge Balls is a fast-paced arcade game where your mission is simple: move, match, and merge colorful balls before time runs out. Easy to pick up, hard to master — and even harder to stop playing!

Key features:

• Quick and snappy gameplay – perfect for coffee breaks or score-chasing marathons.

• Retro pixel art style with an upbeat soundtrack that sticks in your head.

• Increasing challenge – the longer you play, the more intense it gets.

• Endless scoring potential – how long can you keep merging before it all falls apart?

If you love casual games with a retro twist, Super Pixel Merge Balls delivers instant fun with arcade spirit. Simple to learn, hard to put down.
